# NeighborhoodOS

> An open-source operating system for neighborhoods that want to solve their own problems. Pick one sharp pain, ship a working tool in weeks, rotate when needed.

## What it is
NeighborhoodOS is a local-first civic platform piloting in West Waldo, Kansas City, Missouri. It combines a swappable wedge model with an installed local node that can ingest civic signals and turn them into neighbor action.

## Important pages
- https://neighborhoodos.org/ - platform overview and active home-maintenance wedge
- https://neighborhoodos.org/local/ - West Waldo installed node dashboard: 311, council, county, budget, development, and wedge signals
- https://neighborhoodos.org/pilot/ - alias for the Waldo pilot node
- https://neighborhoodos.org/launch.html - 30-day steps to start a node

## Current pilot
West Waldo, Kansas City - home-maintenance coordination plus the revived local civic intelligence dashboard.

## Core sources for the Waldo node
- KCMO open 311 datasets
- Kansas City Legistar / city clerk agendas
- City Plan Commission dockets and staff reports
- KCMO line-item budget datasets
- Jackson County Legislature and property-tax sources

## Contact
- Repo: https://github.com/simonlpaige/neighborhoodos
